title: Mock Test 68 - Telling Stories (Past Narrative)
description: Storytelling/Past Narrative নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Past tenses, Sequence words (First, Then, After that, Finally), Time expressions (Suddenly, Eventually, In the end) — সঠিক ব্যবহার।

questions.question: Storytelling-এ সবচেয়ে বেশি কোন tense ব্যবহার হয়?
questions.explanation: Past Indefinite (Simple Past) is the main tense for storytelling।

questions.question: গল্পের শুরুতে কোন শব্দ ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'Once upon a time / First / Long ago / In the beginning' — সবগুলোই story শুরুতে।

questions.question: ঘটনার ক্রম বোঝাতে কোন sequence word ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'First, Then, After that, Finally' — সবগুলোই events sequence বোঝায়।

questions.question: হঠাৎ কোনো ঘটনা বোঝাতে কোন word ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'Suddenly' = unexpected event বোঝাতে।

questions.question: গল্পের শেষ বোঝাতে কোন phrase ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'In the end / Finally / Eventually' — সবগুলোই ending বোঝায়।

questions.question: Past Continuous (was/were + Ving) কখন ব্যবহার হয়?
questions.explanation: Past Continuous = ongoing action in the past (background)। যেমন: I was walking when it rained।

questions.question: Past Perfect (had + V3) কখন ব্যবহার হয়?
options: দুটি past event-এর মধ্যে আগেরটি বোঝাতে
questions.explanation: Past Perfect = earlier of two past events। 'I had eaten before he arrived.'

questions.question: 'While I was sleeping, the phone rang.' — এখানে 'While' কী বোঝাচ্ছে?
questions.explanation: 'While + past continuous' = something happened during an ongoing action।

questions.question: 'First, we went to Cox's Bazar. Then, we visited Saint Martin.' — 'Then' কী বোঝাচ্ছে?
questions.explanation: 'Then' = next event in sequence।

questions.question: 'It was a dark and stormy night.' — এটি গল্পের কোন অংশ?
questions.explanation: 'It was a dark and stormy night.' = scene-setting opening line (famous story opening)।

questions.question: Error: 'Yesterday I go to the market.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday' → Past needed: 'I went to the market.'

questions.question: Error: 'I was walk when it started raining.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'I was walking' — Past Continuous: was/were + Ving।

questions.question: Error: 'After I had ate dinner, I went out.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Had + V3' → 'had eaten' (ate → eaten)।

questions.question: Error: 'He was going to market when he was meeting his friend.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'When' + Simple Past (met) for short action। 'When he met his friend.'

questions.question: Fill: 'First, we ___ (reach) the station. Then, we bought tickets.'
questions.explanation: Simple Past for completed actions in sequence: 'reached'।

questions.question: Fill: 'While I ___ (watch) TV, the light went out.'
questions.explanation: 'While + past continuous (was watching)' for background action।

questions.question: Fill: 'She ___ (finish) her homework before she went to bed.'
questions.explanation: 'Before she went' → earlier action: 'had finished' (Past Perfect)।

questions.question: Fill: '___ (অবশেষে), they arrived at the destination.'
questions.explanation: 'Finally / At last / Eventually' — সবগুলোই 'অবশেষে' অর্থে।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'প্রথমে, আমরা নাস্তা করলাম। তারপর, আমরা বের হলাম।'
options: First we ate breakfast. Then we left.
First we eat breakfast. Then we leave.
First we had ate. Then left.
First we were eating. Then we left.
questions.explanation: 'First...Then...' + Past Simple (ate, left) — sequence of past events।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি যখন পড়ছিলাম, তখন আমার বন্ধু এলো।'
options: I read when my friend came.
I was reading when my friend came.
I am reading when friend came.
I had read when friend came.
questions.explanation: 'Was reading (ongoing action) when friend came (short action)' = Past Continuous + Simple Past।
